name: Beef Stifado
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds beef chuck or top round, cut into 2-inch cubes
1 cinnamon stick, broken in half (approximately 2 inches)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven over high heat, warm the olive oil or butter.
2. Add beef and brown well on all sides.
3. Add garlic, bay leaves, cinnamon, and allspice; stir well to combine.
4. Dilute tomato paste in water, then add both to the Dutch oven with wine.
5. Bring mixture to a boil, reduce heat to very low, cover, and simmer gently until meat is tender (2 to 2½ hours). Add water as needed to keep the meat immersed throughout the cooking process.
6. About 40 minutes before the meat is done, heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
7. Add onions and cook until golden brown on all sides (about 10 minutes).
8. Remove cooked onions with a slotted spoon and briefly drain on paper towels.
9. Return onions to the Dutch oven and simmer until the meat is fully cooked.
